name: Safe File Search
description: Bounded read-only file search with explicit path, depth, and result limits.
forbidden_actions: deep search under virtual system paths

steps.intent: search files within a bounded scope
steps.description: Search only within an explicit base path and enforce result and depth limits.
steps.condition: base_path is provided and is narrower than root

base_path.description: Caller must provide a narrowed base path; root and virtual system paths are not valid defaults.

post_checks: Keep output limited to the bounded search scope.
